inheritance_quizzes.question: What is inheritance in object-oriented programming?
options: A way to create new classes based on existing ones
A design pattern for user interfaces
inheritance_quizzes.answer: A way to create new classes based on existing ones

inheritance_quizzes.question: Which keyword is commonly used in many languages to define a subclass?
In inheritance, what is the class called that provides properties and methods to another class?
Which of the following is a benefit of using inheritance?
What relationship does inheritance represent between classes?
If class B inherits from class A, which class can access protected methods defined in A?

polymorphism_quizzes.question: What is polymorphism in object-oriented programming?
options: The ability of objects to take on many forms
A way to store data in arrays
polymorphism_quizzes.answer: The ability of objects to take on many forms

polymorphism_quizzes.question: Which feature of polymorphism allows a single interface to represent different underlying forms?
In polymorphism, what does it mean when a subclass provides its own version of a method from the superclass?
Which type of polymorphism is resolved at runtime?
What is an example of polymorphism in many programming languages?
options: A subclass instance used where a superclass type is expected
Declaring multiple variables of the same type
polymorphism_quizzes.answer: A subclass instance used where a superclass type is expected
